user.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Ollama
user.description: Step 1 of 2 — Configure your local Ollama AI instance

influxdb.title: Smart Heating Advisor — InfluxDB
influxdb.description: Step 2 of 3 — Configure your InfluxDB 2.x connection.

weather.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Weather
weather.description: Step 3 of 3 — SHA uses the weather entity to read outside temperature and forecast data for heating analysis. Once saved, add rooms using the **➕ Add Room** button on the integration card.

data_description.weather_entity: The weather integration entity SHA reads for outside temperature and tomorrow's forecast. Usually weather.forecast_home.

error.ollama_connection_failed: Cannot connect to Ollama or model not found. Check URL and model name.
error.influxdb_connection_failed: Cannot connect to InfluxDB. Check URL, token, org and bucket.

abort.already_configured: Smart Heating Advisor is already configured.

user.title: Add Room — Step 1/4: Room Setup
user.description: Configure room name, temperature sensor, radiator thermostats, override settings and humidity monitoring.

data_description.room_name: Select an existing area from the list or type a new name and press Enter to create a custom room name.
data_description.thermostat_sensor: The temperature sensor in this room used to measure comfort zone temperature.
data_description.trvs: The radiator thermostats SHA will control to heat this room.
data_description.fixed_trvs: TRVs that run at a fixed temperature e.g. a heated towel rail. SHA will not adjust their setpoint.
data_description.fixed_trv_temp: The fixed temperature SHA will maintain on these TRVs.
data_description.override_enabled: When enabled allows temporarily pausing SHA heating control for this room for a set duration.
data_description.override_duration_minutes: How long the override lasts before SHA resumes automatic heating control.
data_description.humidity_enabled: SHA monitors humidity to detect shower or cooking activity. When humidity rises significantly above the room baseline SHA maintains heating to bring humidity to a comfortable level. SHA determines the threshold automatically.
data_description.humidity_sensor: The humidity sensor in this room. Used to detect moisture events and adjust heating accordingly.

windows.title: Add Room — Step 3/4: Windows & Airing ({room_name})
windows.description: Configure window sensors and airing mode for **{room_name}**. SHA will pause heating when a window is detected open.

data_description.window_sensors: SHA pauses heating when any of these sensors report open. Leave empty if there are no window sensors in this room.
data_description.airing_mode_enabled: When enabled, a dedicated switch lets you manually trigger an airing pause for this room.
data_description.airing_duration: How long heating pauses when airing mode is activated. Minimum 10 seconds.

temperature.title: Add Room — Step 2/4: Temperature Profile ({room_name})

data_description.schedule_entity: Select a schedule helper that defines when this heating profile is active. Leave empty if you only want a comfort temperature fallback.
data_description.schedule_target_temp: The target temperature SHA will heat this room to when this schedule is active.
data_description.add_another_schedule: Enable to add another schedule after saving this one. Disable when you have added all schedules.
data_description.comfort_temp_enabled: When enabled SHA maintains the comfort temperature below whenever no schedule is active.
data_description.comfort_temp: The fallback temperature SHA targets when no schedule is running. Ignored when comfort temperature is disabled.

confirm.title: Add Room — Step 4/4: Confirm ({room_name})

error.room_already_exists: A room with this name is already configured in SHA. Use a different name.
error.invalid_airing_duration: Please enter a valid duration in HH:MM:SS format (minimum 00:00:10)
error.temperature_profile_required: Please add at least one schedule or enable the comfort temperature. SHA needs a temperature target to control heating in this room.

user.title: Vacation Settings
user.description:
Configure vacation mode. SHA will use a reduced heating profile while you are away.

Delete this subentry and recreate to change settings.

data_description.vacation_mode: Heating strategy applied while vacation mode is active.
data_description.vacation_start_date: SHA activates vacation automatically from this date. Outside the date range the manual toggle controls vacation.
data_description.vacation_end_date: SHA deactivates vacation automatically after this date.

error.end_date_required: If you set a start date you must also set an end date.
error.end_before_start: End date must be after start date.

abort.already_configured: Vacation settings are already configured. Click the existing Vacation entry to edit it.

init.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Settings
init.description: Update connection settings. Vacation mode is configured via the **Vacation Settings** button on the integration card.

data_description.debug_logging: Writes detailed logs for entity creation, room discovery, InfluxDB queries, Ollama prompts and responses, and heating rate updates. Disable when not actively debugging.
data_description.influxdb_token: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.
data_description.ollama_url: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.
data_description.outside_temp_sensor: Optional. If you have a dedicated outdoor temperature sensor select it here for more accurate outside temperature readings. When set this takes priority over the weather entity.
